upstream.layout: d3-sankey (layered flow layout, justify default alignment)
upstream.introduced: v10.3.0 (experimental; syntax page warns it is to be extended)

constructs.note: both spellings route to the family; canonical serialization emits sankey-beta (the spelling the wider rendering ecosystem accepts)
exactly three columns per RFC 4180 subset; row order is authored order and is preserved
double-quoted fields may contain commas; content preserved exactly
a doubled quote inside a quoted field is a literal quote
explicitly allowed by the syntax page for visual grouping
nodes appear in first-appearance order (drives palette + layout seeding)
parallel duplicates are kept separate, addressed by occurrence in typed ops
flow-area extent; canvas additionally grows so labels never clip
gradient renders as the source→target color-mix midpoint blend (see divergences)
d3-sankey alignment family; justify flushes pure sinks to the last layer
value line under node labels, full authored precision
outlined adds a background paint-order halo
authored per-label fills override the categorical palette
accepted and declared no-op (Tier-3 INEFFECTIVE_CONFIG), like pie/xychart

examples.source:
sankey-beta
  Coal,Electricity generation,127.93
  Gas,Electricity generation,151.89
  Electricity generation,Industry,342.16
  Electricity generation,Losses,56.69

sankey-beta
  Pumped heat,"Heating and cooling, homes",193.026
  Pumped heat,"Heating and cooling, ""commercial""",70.672

---
config:
  sankey:
    showValues: false
    nodeAlignment: left
    linkColor: source
---
sankey-beta
  Budget,Engineering,62
  Budget,Design,18
  Engineering,Platform,30

divergences.upstream: linkColor: gradient paints each ribbon with an SVG <linearGradient> from the source node color to the target node color
divergences.agentic: the scene-security contract forbids URL-referencing paints (url(#…) is a fetching form), so gradient renders as the deterministic source→target midpoint blend via color-mix(); each direction pair still gets a distinct hue
divergences.rationale: no existing family emits gradient paints; markers are the only sanctioned def references, via typed MarkerDescriptors

divergences.upstream: cycles reach d3-sankey, which throws an opaque 'circular link' error at layout time
divergences.agentic: self-loops and cycles are rejected at parse time with the offending path named (A -> B -> A)
divergences.rationale: the faithfulness contract prefers loud, actionable diagnostics over downstream library throws

divergences.upstream: a zero/tiny-value node can render as a zero-height rectangle (invisible data)
divergences.agentic: node heights clamp to a 1px visibility floor; zero-value links render at width 0 but their nodes stay visible
divergences.rationale: the faithfulness contract forbids silently dropping authored data from the drawing

divergences.upstream: labels can overflow the fixed width×height canvas and clip
divergences.agentic: the canvas grows (and content shifts) so measured labels never clip; sankey.width/height size the flow area, not the final SVG
divergences.rationale: deterministic text metrics make non-clipping label layout a solvable constraint

divergences.upstream: showValues renders values through upstream number formatting
divergences.agentic: values render at full authored precision (String(value)) with prefix/suffix applied verbatim
divergences.rationale: authored data is displayed faithfully; no rounding policy is invented

divergences.upstream: ribbons paint the raw node color at 0.5 opacity; on low-contrast themes the composited ribbon can drop to WCAG ~1.0 / APCA 0 against the page
divergences.agentic: palette-derived ribbon strokes route through ensureCompositedBgContrast: the stroke is deepened (bounded OKLCH lightness search) until the alpha-composited color clears the WCAG 1.25 / APCA 15 wedge floors; authored nodeColors and static linkColor stay authoritative and are never repainted
divergences.rationale: the shared palette guarantees its floors for opaque marks only; a translucent sole-encoding mark must hold the floors on the color the viewer actually sees (gate: scene-effective-paint-contract.test.ts)

divergences.upstream: no conservation check: an intermediate node silently renders at max(inflow, outflow)
divergences.agentic: verify emits the advisory FLOW_IMBALANCE lint naming the node, inflow, outflow, and the unaccounted amount; never flips verify.ok
divergences.rationale: conservation across stages is the domain's defining property (Wikipedia: Sankey diagram); surfacing the imbalance beats absorbing it into geometry

divergences.upstream: matches upstream: cycles are rejected (d3-sankey circular links); the broader Sankey tradition does draw return/recirculation loops
divergences.agentic: cycles reject loudly at parse with the offending path spelled out; return flows are out of scope for both implementations
divergences.rationale: domain-level divergence recorded for honesty; fidelity audit carries the same note
